name: Pineapple Breakfast Shake
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve 3/4 cup of juice in a separate container.
2. Measure out 1/2 cup of pineapple chunks and set aside for another use.
3. In a blender, combine the remaining pineapple chunks with milk and vanilla extract.
4. Blend until smooth.
5. Pour into glasses and serve.
